name: daily-status-ctx
description: Daily status check using context-saver batch execution. Replaces 4 separate skill calls (23 KB) with a single batch call (2 KB).

commands.intent: summary with status for each service

steps.command: python3 scripts/ctx_session.py log --type daily_status --priority medium --data '{"completed": true}'
python3 scripts/notify.py send --to user --priority medium --subject 'Daily Status' --body 'See pipeline output'
